name: Pop's Buffalo Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Deep fry the wing pieces in small batches in hot oil at 385°F (193°C) until cooked through, about 10 minutes. Drain on paper towels.
2. While draining, sprinkle chicken with black pepper.
3. In a large skillet, melt margarine over medium heat.
4. Add hot sauce, garlic salt, and cayenne to the melted margarine; stir to combine.
5. Toss the drained chicken wings into the skillet with the sauce mixture, stirring to coat evenly.
6. Once all the chicken is coated in the sauce, add paprika and mix again.
7. Allow the chicken to stand for a while before reheating.
8. Reheat the wings if desired before serving.
9. Serve with celery sticks and Blue Cheese Dip.
